channel.title: Nalainee Cheng | Professional Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content on Nalainee Cheng | Professional Portfolio

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hi there, I’m Nalainee Cheng! ✨ Link to heading

Education Trainer | Luxury Retail & Beauty Education | Fragrance & Makeup Specialist

I am a dedicated Training Manager and Education Specialist based in Greater Kuala Lumpur. With over a decade of experience, I specialize in designing, implementing, and managing highly effective training programs for the luxury beauty and fragrance industry. I am passionate about empowering employees, driving brand experience, and enhancing organizational performance through engaging education.
